seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building Agentic RAG with Haystack enables sophisticated multi-step retrieval agents that plan queries, fetch from diverse sources, and synthesize grounded responses. However, the autonomous nature amplifies risks like hallucination, irrelevant retrievals, and planning failures that can erode trust in production. Vex integration provides runtime verification for source faithfulness, consistency, and accuracy, ensuring reliable outputs.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
Agentic RAG in Haystack uses a Pipeline with a RouterAgent that decomposes user queries into sub-queries via an LLM planner. Sub-queries route to specialized retrievers (e.g., vector DB for semantic search, SQL for structured data, web search for current events). Retrieved contexts feed a Reranker and multi-source Synthesizer that generates final responses with citations.

The agent loop iterates until convergence, with tools for self-reflection and replanning. Custom components handle source attribution and multi-hop reasoning. Haystack's composable nodes make it ideal for production but expose failure modes in type mismatches and silent errors.

Vex slots in as a verification component post-retrieval and post-generation to catch deviations before user exposure.

risks.name: Pipeline component output type mismatches
risks.description: Retriever returns Document objects but downstream generator expects string context, causing silent TypeError
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation component enforces type contracts between nodes

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: Agent plans correct sub-query but vector retriever surface low-quality matches due to embedding drift
risks.mitigation: Vex relevance scoring + reranking verification rejects <0.8 cosine similarity contexts

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: Synthesizer fabricates details not grounded in any retrieved source despite citation formatting
risks.mitigation: Vex source faithfulness checks trace every claim to specific document spans

risks.name: Custom component errors silently swallowed
risks.description: Agent reflection loop fails on malformed tool output but pipeline continues with stale state
risks.mitigation: Vex error boundary component surfaces and classifies all custom node exceptions

implementation.title: Agentic Query Planner Pipeline
implementation.description: Core routing agent that decomposes queries and dispatches to retrievers with Vex planning verification
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline, component

from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

from haystack.components.agents import InitializeAgent, AgentSchema

from vex import VexVerifier

@component
class PlanningVerifier:
    @component.output_types(approved=bool, feedback=str)
    def run(self, plan: str) -> dict:
        verifier = VexVerifier(api_key="your-vex-key")
        result = verifier.verify_query_plan(
            query_plan=plan,
            verification_type="query_planning_accuracy"
        )
        return {"approved": result.score > 0.9, "feedback": result.reasoning}

planning_pipe = Pipeline()
planning_pipe.add_component("prompt_builder", PromptBuilder("agent_prompt.jinja"))
planning_pipe.add_component("llm", OpenAI())
planning_pipe.add_component("planner", InitializeAgent())
planning_pipe.add_component("vex_planning", PlanningVerifier())

planning_pipe.connect("prompt_builder", "llm")
planning_pipe.connect("llm", "planner")
planning_pipe.connect("planner", "vex_planning")

implementation.title: Multi-Retriever Fusion with Reranking
implementation.description: Parallel retrievers with Vex relevance verification and Cohere reranking for optimal context selection
implementation.code:
from haystack.components.retrievers import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.rankers import CohereRerank

from vex import VexContextVerifier

retrieval_pipe = Pipeline()

retrieval_pipe.add_component(
    "vector_retriever", 
    InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store, embedding_model="text-embedding-ada-002")
)
retrieval_pipe.add_component(
    "sql_retriever", 
    SQLRetriever(connection_string="postgresql://...")
)
retrieval_pipe.add_component("vex_relevance", VexContextVerifier())
retrieval_pipe.add_component("reranker", CohereRerank(model="rerank-multilingual-v2.0"))

retrieval_pipe.connect("input", "vector_retriever")
retrieval_pipe.connect("input", "sql_retriever")
retrieval_pipe.connect("vector_retriever.documents", "vex_relevance")
retrieval_pipe.connect("sql_retriever", "vex_relevance")
retrieval_pipe.connect("vex_relevance", "reranker.documents")

result = retrieval_pipe.run({
    "vector_retriever.query_embedding": query_embedding,
    "sql_retriever.query": sub_query
})

implementation.description: Vex verifies factual alignment across multiple retrieval sources before synthesis

vexIntegration.title: Vex Custom Pipeline Component
vexIntegration.description: Install and register Vex as a Haystack component for schema-enforced verification

vexIntegration.title: Agent Loop with Vex Guardrails
vexIntegration.description: Wrap agent iterations with Vex verification to prevent divergence
vexIntegration.code:
from haystack.agents import Agent
from haystack.components.agents import AgentSchema

class GuardedAgent(Agent):
    def __init__(self, *args, vex_client=None, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)
        self.vex = vex_client
    
    def _run_once(self, query, max_iterations=5):
        for i in range(max_iterations):
            plan = self.planner.generate(query)
            
            # Vex planning check
            plan_valid = self.vex.verify_query_plan(plan)
            if not plan_valid:
                query = self.vex.suggested_replan(query, plan)
                continue
            
            contexts = self.retrieve_multi(plan)
            response = self.synthesize(contexts)
            
            # Final verification
            final_check = self.vex.verify_final({
                'query': query,
                'contexts': contexts,
                'response': response
            })
            
            if final_check.passed:
                return response
        
        raise ValueError("Agent failed convergence after max iterations")

# Usage
agent = GuardedAgent(
    tools=[vector_tool, sql_tool],
    llm=gpt4o,
    vex_client=VexClient("your-key")
)
result = agent.run("Complex multi-hop query")

vexIntegration.title: Production Monitoring Integration
vexIntegration.description: Stream verification telemetry to Vex dashboard for Haystack pipelines
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import VexMonitor
from haystack import Pipeline

class MonitoredPipeline(Pipeline):
    def __init__(self, *args, vex_project_id: str = None, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)
        self.monitor = VexMonitor(project_id=vex_project_id)
    
    def run(self, **inputs):
        query_id = self.monitor.start_session(inputs.get('query', 'unknown'))
        
        try:
            result = super().run(**inputs)
            
            # Log full trace
            self.monitor.log_pipeline_run(
                query_id=query_id,
                inputs=inputs,
                outputs=result,
                components=self.components.keys(),
                latency=result.get('runtime', 0)
            )
            
            return result
        
        except Exception as e:
            self.monitor.log_error(query_id, str(e))
            raise

# Production deployment
prod_pipe = MonitoredPipeline(
    vex_project_id="prj_haystack-agentic-rag",
    components=full_agent_pipeline
)

# Dashboard: https://app.vex.im/projects/prj_haystack-agentic-rag
